message:
fix: iOS layout overflow on narrow screens

- Top bar icons: wrapped in Flexible + horizontal ScrollView for iPhone
- Channel info controls: replaced TextButton.icon with IconButton for
  fullscreen to prevent overflow in 190px-wide info panel on iPad
- Tested on iPhone 16 and iPad Pro 11 M4 simulators (iOS 18.6)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
